title: KinStatusRecord
description: Status record for a Kin companion in Mission Control dashboard. Provides health status, specialization, and avatar information.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this Kin status record

kin_id.description: Unique identifier for the Kin companion

name.description: Human-readable name of the Kin companion

status.description: Current health status of the Kin

last_seen.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the Kin was last active

glb_url.description: URL to the GLB 3D avatar model for this Kin

specialization.description: Primary specialization of the Kin (e.g., web-design, family-companion)

owner_consent_flags.description: Owner consent settings for this Kin

data_collection.description: Whether owner consented to data collection

voice_recording.description: Whether owner consented to voice recording

research_access.description: Whether owner consented to research access

support_safe_summary.description: Support-safe summary of Kin status for operator visibility

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was last updated
